# Screenshot Placeholders

Replace these SVG placeholders with actual screenshots before publishing to Codecanyon. Recommended size: 1600×900 or 1920×1080.

Files referenced by ItemDescription.html:
- 01-dashboard.svg — Main dashboard
- 02-employee-list.svg — Employee listing with filters
- 03-leave-requests.svg — Leave request list + approval
- 04-timesheets.svg — Timesheet overview
- 05-dark-mode.svg — Dark mode UI example

Tips:
- Hide sensitive data
- Use realistic demo values
- Keep consistent theme and spacing
